ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., marathon, half-marathon, 5K) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "residence" TEXT /* Residence of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the participant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the participant */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of residence of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the participant */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "official_time" TEXT /* Official finish time of the participant */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant */,
  "chip_time" TEXT /* Chip time of the participant */,
  "gun_time" TEXT /* Gun time of the participant */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Pace of the participant */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the participant */,
  "gender_rank" INTEGER /* Gender-based rank of the participant */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Division-based rank of the participant */,
  "bib_number" TEXT /* Bib number of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., Age Group, Gender) */,
  "division_type" TEXT /* Type of division (e.g., age group, gender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "division_results" (
  "division_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant within the division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_type" TEXT /* Type of division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_division_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_division_results_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of the age group (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_genders" (
  "participant_gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-gender association */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_genders_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_genders_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_age_groups" (
  "participant_age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-age group association */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_age_groups_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_age_groups_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, event_manager, participant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_configurations" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., participation rate, average finish time) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsor_events" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the volunteer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_events" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id", "event_id")
)
